verifier_values.criteria: Report the mean value of the overage charges as 103 +/- 2
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: The prompt requests to report the mean and median values of the daily overage charges, rounded to the nearest integer.

verifier_values.criteria: Report the median value of the overage charges as 36 +/- 2
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: The prompt requests to report the mean and median values of the daily overage charges, rounded to the nearest integer.

verifier_values.criteria: Report 2.7% +/- 0.2% of subscribers in the low group experienced overage (acceptable range 2.67% to 2.73%).
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: The prompt requests for each of the three groups (low/medium/high), to report the percentage of all distinct subscribers who experienced overage, in % value rounded to one decimal point.

verifier_values.criteria: Report 2.3% +/- 0.2% of subscribers in the medium group experienced overage (acceptable range 2.28% to 2.32%).
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: The prompt requests for each of the three groups (low/medium/high), to report the percentage of all distinct subscribers who experienced overage, in % value rounded to one decimal point.

verifier_values.criteria: Report 2.1% +/- 0.2% of subscribers in the high group experienced overage (acceptable range 2.08% to 2.12%).
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: The prompt requests for each of the three groups (low/medium/high), to report the percentage of all distinct subscribers who experienced overage, in % value rounded to one decimal point.
